name: Cod Fillets with Cucumber Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the cucumber, dill weed, green onions, salt (if using), and plain yogurt in a blender until smooth.
2. Pour the pureed mixture into a small bowl and set aside.
3. Arrange the cod fillets on a roasting rack. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
4. Cover the fish with wax paper and microwave at High power for 5 to 7 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily. Be sure to rearrange the fillets halfway through the cooking time.
5. Reduce the power to Medium and microwave the cucumber dill sauce for 1 to 3 minutes to heat it through.
6. Serve the heated cucumber dill sauce over the cooked cod fillets.
